perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female creator appears on screen wearing a red sweater, with a split-screen reference video on the top left showing the creation of a fruit bowl. (2) She starts preparing 'Hwachae' by putting ice into a large glass bowl, followed by blueberries and whole strawberries. (3) She pours a cup of CoCo strawberry drink with pearls into the bowl and then pours a can of Sprite over the fruit. (4) She uses a large silver ladle to scoop the mixture and begins eating strawberries and blueberries, holding a small Rode microphone close to her mouth for ASMR sounds. (5) In the final segment, she holds up a yellow box of 'NEAR' V-Care candies and demonstrates taking one.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo K-pop/Electronic BGM starts immediately with a female voice speaking in an energetic, high-pitched tone. (2) Sounds of ice clinking against glass and liquid pouring are audible over the music. (3) The vocal volume remains high, explaining the ingredients. (4) Eating sounds (crunching and chewing) are amplified as she holds the microphone close to her mouth. (5) The music continues at a consistent volume as she transitions to a faster, more instructional speaking tone for the product endorsement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: '韓國最新草莓吃法 草莓加「珍珠雪碧」?' - Introducing a new way to eat strawberries. (2) Functional Text: '加草莓', 'Hwachae (花菜)', '爆多' - Labeling ingredients and reactions. (3) Descriptive Text: '藍莓+珍珠必增加!!! 口感超有趣' - Describing the texture of the food. (4) Endorsement Text: '吃完宵夜記得吃V臉糖', '是Sana也愛吃這個' - Promotional text for the supplement.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Ingredient Prep -> Pouring Liquids -> ASMR Eating -> Product Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; 1 female visible in the reference video insert at the start.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a red knitted sweater and a small hair clip. She has professional makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting with a colorful poster that says 'HAPPINESS is' and various small decorative objects on a shelf.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to introduce a trendy Korean dessert recipe (Hwachae) to a Chinese-speaking audience while integrating a product placement for a beauty supplement (NEAR V-Care) to address the concern of facial bloating after late-night snacks.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator directly shows the product box, explains its benefits (V-Line management), and mentions it is used by a celebrity (Sana).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-pitched enthusiastic greeting, close-up eating ASMR, and traditional Chinese captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows the 'Hwachae' viral trend on TikTok/Douyin, using high-speed editing to maintain viewer engagement.
